Home/Services/Commercial HVAC

Commercial HVAC Service in Phoenix, AZ

Keep your business open and your customers comfortable. We service rooftop units, package systems, server rooms, and full commercial HVAC infrastructure across the Valley — with response times measured in hours, not days.

Request commercial quote Call (602) 773-5522

When your AC goes down, your business goes down

An empty restaurant during lunch service. A retail store nobody wants to walk into. An office where the staff can't focus. A server room that's about to throw thousands of dollars in equipment offline. Commercial HVAC failures aren't just uncomfortable — they cost money by the hour. That's why our commercial division operates differently from our residential service: faster response, certified technicians on every truck, and emergency parts inventory specifically stocked for commercial systems.

We've been the go-to commercial HVAC partner for Phoenix office complexes, restaurants, dental and medical practices, retail centers, warehouses, and tech companies for over two decades. Whether you need a single rooftop replaced or a multi-tenant building covered under a maintenance contract, we'll show up with the right people, the right parts, and the right plan.

Our commercial HVAC services

Commercial AC repair

Rooftop units, package units, split systems, and chillers — diagnosed and repaired without disrupting your operating hours. We coordinate after-hours and weekend visits whenever it makes sense for your business.

Commercial AC installation & replacement

From single rooftop replacements to multi-zone VRF design-build projects. We handle the engineering, permitting, crane scheduling, and city inspection coordination. Most installations qualify for Section 179 tax deductions — meaning you can often expense the entire system in year one.

Server room & computer room AC (CRAC)

Precision cooling for IT closets, server rooms, and data centers. We engineer redundant N+1 systems with 24/7 remote monitoring, ensuring your equipment stays within the strict 64-80°F operating window. Spec'd for telecom, financial services, healthcare, and SaaS facilities.

Commercial heating

Industrial-strength heating for the rare Phoenix cold snap. Repair, replacement, and ongoing maintenance for rooftop heat pumps, gas furnaces, and unit heaters in warehouses or industrial spaces.

Preventative maintenance contracts

The single best way to protect your bottom line. Our quarterly maintenance contracts include scheduled inspections, priority emergency response, discounted parts & labor, and detailed digital reports for every unit — perfect for facilities managers and property owners who want documentation.

Industries we serve

  • Office buildings & multi-tenant complexes
  • Retail stores & shopping centers
  • Restaurants, bars, and quick-service food
  • Medical, dental, and veterinary practices
  • Property management portfolios
  • Light industrial and warehouse facilities
  • Tech companies, server rooms, and data closets
  • Auto dealerships, fitness centers, salons & spas
  • Religious and educational facilities

Why facility managers choose us

  • Real 24/7 response — not voicemail. A live dispatcher and on-call technicians, around the clock.
  • EPA-certified, NATE-trained technicians with experience on every major commercial brand.
  • Detailed digital reports — photos, measurements, and recommendations after every visit, sent to your inbox.
  • Single point of contact — you'll work with one account manager who knows your sites and your equipment.
  • Net-30 invoicing for established commercial accounts.
  • 23+ years of commercial HVAC experience across the Valley.
  • Section 179 expertise — we'll help you take full advantage of the commercial HVAC tax deduction.

Why preventative maintenance contracts pay for themselves

The math on commercial HVAC maintenance is straightforward: planned maintenance costs roughly $0.10 per square foot per year. The average emergency repair on a 5-ton commercial rooftop unit runs $1,200 to $3,500. One avoided breakdown a year typically pays for the entire contract — and that doesn't include the soft costs of lost productivity, lost sales, or unhappy tenants. Our contracts include two to four scheduled visits per year, priority dispatch, and discounted rates on any non-contract repairs.

Commercial dispatch

Live answer 24/7. Most commercial calls dispatched within 90 minutes during business hours.
